Quality & Compliance

In the medical field, quality isn't just a standard—it's a commitment to patient safety. KRG Medifabb operates under strict international regulatory frameworks.

ISO 13485:2016

Intertek / TÜV

International quality management system specifically for medical device manufacturing.

CE Certificate

European Union Compliance

Conformity with health, safety, and environmental protection standards for products sold within the EEA.

ISO 9001:2015

General Quality Management

Ensures that our products and services consistently meet customer requirements.

State-of-the-Art Manufacturing

Our facility in Chennai is designed for high-efficiency, sterile medical production. We maintain rigorous standards for infection control.

Controlled Environment

Manufacturing takes place in positive pressure environments to minimize particulate contamination.

Sterilization Protocols

ETO (Ethylene Oxide) sterilization compatible workflows with documented batch traceability.

Staff Training

Regular training for manufacturing staff on hygiene, PPE usage, and quality inspection.

Manufacturing Transparency

CLEANROOM VISION

Air Changes

25+/Hour

HEPA filtered ventilation

Hygiene Protocol

Level 4

Strict gowning mandatory

Material Feed

Automated

Zero-touch handling

Traceability

Batch-Wise

ERP integrated tracking

Polymer to Fabric

Sourcing clinical-grade SS/SMS polymers with verified barrier properties.

Stage 01
Stage 02

Precision Conversion

Laser-guided cutting and ultrasonic welding in controlled environments.

ETO Sterilization

12-hour sterilization cycle with 48-hour aeration for zero residue.

Stage 03
Stage 04

Pouch Integrity Test

Peel-strength and dye-penetration tests for every batch.

Quality Workflow

01

Raw Material Audit

02

In-Process Check

03

Sterility Testing

04

Batch Release
